channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Astera Labs Stock Slides 3.2% Amid AI Boom Despite Strong Growth Outlook
item.description: NEW YORK — Shares of Astera Labs Inc. fell more than 3% in early trading Tuesday as the semiconductor company specializing in high-speed connectivity for artificial intelligence infrastructure gave back some of its recent sharp gains, even as analysts continu… [Intel]

item.title: China has spent 3.6 times more than the US on chipmaking subsidies over the past decade — $142 billion and counting, easily outweighs CHIPS Act
item.description: Semiconductor industrial policy spending in China totaled around $142 billion between 2014 and 2023, roughly 3.6 times higher than the $39 billion committed in the United States over the same period.
